item.title: A Coruña, Galicia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

item.title: Accessibility Statement
item.description:
Accessibility Statement

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Our Commitment

Northshore Press is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We are continually improving the user experience for everyone and applying the relevant accessibility standards.

Conformance Status

The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) defines requirements for designers and developers to improve accessibility for people with disabilities. It defines three levels of conformance: Level A, Level AA, and Level AAA.

item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description:
Affiliate Disclosure

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

FTC Disclosure

In accordance with the Federal Trade Commission (FTC) guidelines, URCity discloses that some of the links on this website are affiliate links. This means that if you click on the link and make a purchase or sign up for a service, we may receive a commission at no additional cost to you.

Our Commitment to Transparency

URCity is reader-supported. When you click on certain links on our website and make a purchase or sign up for a service, we may earn a commission at no additional cost to you. This affiliate revenue helps us maintain and improve our free content.

item.title: Cookie Policy
item.description:
Cookie Policy

Last updated: June 30, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

What Are Cookies?

Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help websites remember your preferences and improve your experience.

How We Use Cookies

Essential Cookies:

  • Required for the website to function properly
  • Cannot be disabled
  • These do not track you or store personal information

Analytics Cookies (with your consent):

  • We use Google Analytics 4 to understand how visitors interact with our site
  • This helps us improve content and user experience
  • Google Analytics sets cookies only after you click “Accept” on our cookie banner
  • If you decline, no analytics cookies are set and no tracking occurs
  • Data collected is anonymized and processed by Google

Third-Party Cookies

We use one third-party service that may set cookies:

item.title: Methodology
item.description:
Our Methodology

URCity combines data from official government sources with proprietary calculations to give you the most accurate picture of life in any city across the US, UK, and Canada. We currently cover 164 cities across 3 countries.

Data Sources

We use only official, verified data sources:

United States

  • Council for Community and Economic Research (C2ER) — Cost of Living Index
  • Bureau of Labor Statistics (BLS) — Consumer Expenditure Survey
  • Bureau of Economic Analysis (BEA) — Regional Price Parities
  • Zillow Research — Home values, rents, price per square foot
  • HUD Fair Market Rents — Rental affordability benchmarks
  • US Census Bureau — Population, income, education, commuting
  • IRS Statistics of Income — Migration patterns
  • National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration (NOAA) — Climate normals
  • Tax Foundation — State and local tax rates
  • FCC Broadband Data — Internet availability and speeds
  • EPA Smart Location Database — Walkability and transit access
  • FBI Uniform Crime Reporting — Crime statistics
  • U.S. Energy Information Administration (EIA) — State-level natural gas prices and electricity costs

United Kingdom

  • Office for National Statistics (ONS) — Cost of living and earnings data
  • Rightmove — Home values and rental prices
  • ONS Annual Survey of Hours and Earnings — Income data
  • HM Revenue & Customs (HMRC) — Tax rates
  • Met Office — Climate data
  • Ofcom — Broadband availability
  • Ofgem — Gas and electricity price caps
  • Water UK — Water utility costs

Canada

  • Statistics Canada — Cost of living, income, and demographic data
  • Canadian Real Estate Association (CREA) — Home values and sales data
  • Canada Mortgage and Housing Corporation (CMHC) — Rental market data
  • Environment and Climate Change Canada — Climate data
  • Canada Revenue Agency — Tax rates
  • ISED (Innovation, Science and Economic Development) — Broadband data
  • Canada Energy Regulator — Natural gas and electricity prices

Calculation Methods

Cost of Living Index

Our cost of living indices are based on the C2ER methodology, which compares prices across six categories:

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Privacy Policy

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Introduction

URCity (“we,” “our,” or “us”) is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

Information We Collect

Automatically Collected:

  • IP address (anonymized where possible)
  • Browser type and version
  • Pages visited and time spent
  • Referring website
  • Device information

Via Forms:

  • Email address (if you subscribe to our newsletter)
  • Search queries (anonymized)

How We Use Your Information

  • Improve website functionality and content
  • Analyze traffic patterns
  • Personalize content recommendations
  • Send newsletters (only if you opt in)
  • Comply with legal obligations

Cookies and Tracking

We use cookies and similar technologies to:

item.title: Terms of Service
item.description:
Terms of Service

Last updated: June 28, 2026

Publisher: Northshore Press (https://northshorepress.co)

Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using URCity.com, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our website.

Use of the Website

You may use URCity.com for personal, non-commercial purposes. You agree not to:

  • Use the site for any illegal purpose
  • Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
  • Interfere with the proper working of the site
  • Copy, scrape, or redistribute our content without permission

Content and Data

All content on URCity.com is for informational purposes only. We strive for accuracy but make no guarantees. Data is sourced from public records and third-party providers and may not be current.
